YOUR AI EMPLOYEE TEAM.
INSTALLED IN 4 PHASES. LIVE IN 12 DAYS.

SPEED IS A WEAPON. WE USE IT.

01

AUDIT

DAY 1

90-minute kickoff. We go deep.

  • - Your ICP defined
  • - Stack mapping
  • - Pipeline confirmed
  • - "Qualified" locked
Alignment Locked
02

BUILD

DAYS 2–10

We build while you run.

  • - Day 2–3: R&D
  • - Day 4–5: Engine
  • - Day 6: Logic
  • - Day 7: CRM depth
Infrastructure Scaling
03

LAUNCH

DAYS 11–12

System goes live.

  • - Day 11: Final check
  • - Day 12: Go live
  • - Bridge stabilized
  • - Dashboard active
Revenue System Live
04

COMPOUND

DAY 30+

Optimization.

  • - Day 30: 20+ meetings
  • - Weekly tuning
  • - Sentiment analysis
  • - System compounds
Scaling Performance
